title: Directory-level architectural abstraction for lib/reduce
description: The lib/reduce directory is responsible for implementing reducers for MapReduce jobs. The reducers take in a key and an iterable of values, and they calculate the sum of all the values for that key. The result is then written to the context using the key and the sum. The IntSumReducer and LongSumReducer classes collaborate by sharing the same core logic, which is to iterate over the values and calculate the sum. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a modular and reusable implementation of reducers for MapReduce jobs, which can be easily integrated into different MapReduce applications.
